articles.title: The Missionary's Recompense Edith Anna Johnson
articles.author: Edith Anna Johnson
articles.notes: The article is not present in any of the 4 provided PDF page images. The images show advertisements, table of contents, a poem 'My Dixie Home' by President A.W. Ivins, and a photograph of President Heber J. Grant overlooking Dixie on Hurricane Mountain. The missing article would have been on page 637, but these images appear to be from different page numbers in the magazine.
